title: TIP-1.0 Adapter Manifest
description: Declares a per-client integration (Claude Code, Cursor, Aider, Cline, Continue, Codex) OR a framework bridge (LangChain, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, AutoGen, Langfuse). See https://docs.tokenpak.ai/protocol/manifest-spec.

id.description: Stable lowercase identifier (claude-code, cursor, langchain, etc.).

adapter_kind.description: Which direction this adapter faces. client-integration = wires a specific client tool (claude-code, cursor, aider, cline, continue, codex). framework-bridge = exposes TokenPak to user-space framework code (langchain, llamaindex, crewai, autogen, langfuse, litellm).

name.description: The client tool or framework this adapter targets.

version_range.description: semver range of the target the adapter is compatible with.

settings_path.description: Relative path inside the user's home where the adapter writes configuration (e.g. ~/.claude/settings.json).

capabilities.description: Capability labels this adapter publishes. MUST include 'tip.adapter.client-integration' or 'tip.adapter.framework-bridge' depending on adapter_kind.
